rulings.Case Title: CERVANTES, ENRIQUE vs. L/O JOHN G. HANLIN, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike First Amended Cross Complaint; Request For Statutory Attorney Fees; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: DENY SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE. DEFENDANT PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. DENY REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS. SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE NOT FRIVOLOUS. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: CERVANTES, ENRIQUE vs. L/O JOHN G. HANLIN, A et al

rulings.Case Title: 2836 WASHINGTON STREET VS COMPOSICRETE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Prevaling Parties And Award Of Attorney Fees.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT $21,937.50 IN FEES. PLAINTIFF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY. SEE PACIFIC CUSTOM POOLS, INC. V. TURNER CONSTRUCTION CO., (2000) 79 CAL.APP.4TH 1254. RAISCH DECLARATION SUBSTANTIATES FEES, BUT PEINADO DECLARATION IS TOO CONCLUSORY. DENY COSTS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 870 PROCEDURE. (PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint By Deft.S
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PARAGRAPH 13 IS NOT AN ATTORNEY'S FEES CLAUSE BUT RATHER, AN INDEMNITY CLAUSE. (PB)
